seoTitle: Hughes vs Isaacs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hughes and Isaacs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hughes and Isaacs.
heading: Hughes vs Isaacs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hughes, Australian Capital Territory and Isaacs, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Isaacs has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Hughes (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hughes or Isaacs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hughes has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Isaacs scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hughes scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Isaacs scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hughes or Isaacs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Isaacs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
